parsed.production_notes: The video is a simple point-of-view recording of a person's hands interacting with a quiz paper and a smartphone. All movements, lighting, and objects appear natural and consistent with a real-world recording.

characters.appearance: Only the character's hands are visible. She has a medium to tan complexion with slender hands and neatly trimmed fingernails. No other physical features are shown.
characters.wardrobe: Not applicable as only hands are visible.
characters.demeanor: Instructional and deliberate in her actions, with a clear, friendly, and encouraging vocal tone.

scenes.setting: A desk or table with a dark grey, textured surface. A white sheet of paper with a printed quiz is the main focus. The lighting is bright and even.

panels.panel_visual_description: A top-down, close-up shot focuses on a white sheet of paper lying on a dark grey surface. A person's right hand, Character A, enters the frame holding a bright green marker pen. The hand has a medium-tan complexion. It moves down the paper, placing a green checkmark next to an answer on a multiple-choice quiz. The hand repeats this action for two more questions, moving methodically. The lighting is direct and even, casting a soft shadow from the hand and pen.

scenes.visual_description: A top-down shot shows Character A's hand using a green pen to mark correct answers on a printed quiz sheet. The quiz involves translating Kannada sentences into English. As the narrator reads each question and its correct answer, the hand marks the corresponding option with a green checkmark. Animated countdown timers appear for each question. A pop-up notification from 'Truecaller' for a 'Bank of India' transaction briefly appears at the top of the screen around the 4-second mark.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ನಾನು ಓದುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇನೆ. [I am studying.]

[timer sound]

Character A says: I am studying.

[notification sound]

Character A says: ಅವಳು ಓದುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾಳೆ. [She is studying.]

[timer sound]

Character A says: She is studying.

Character A says: ನಾನು ಓದಲು ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇನೆ. [I am going to study.]

[timer sound]

Character A says: I am going to study.

scenes.setting: The same desk setting as the previous scene, with the quiz paper now serving as a background element under a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: A top-down, close-up shot shows Character A's hands holding a black smartphone. The phone's screen displays a wallpaper featuring the Earth and Moon in space. The right hand, still holding the green marker, taps the screen to open an app store. The right index finger then scrolls down the app's page. The left hand supports the phone from the side. The quiz paper from the previous scene is visible underneath the phone.

scenes.visual_description: Character A's hands pick up a smartphone, with the quiz paper visible in the background. They navigate the phone's home screen, open the Google Play Store, and go to the 'Zinglish: English Speaking App' page. The right index finger scrolls through the app's details on the screen, while the narrator explains its benefits and gives a call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ನೋಡಿದ್ರಾ? ಇದೇ ರೀತಿ ನೀವು ಕನ್ನಡದ ಮೂಲಕ ಈಸಿಯಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನ ಕಲಿತುಕೊಳ್ಳಬೇಕು ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಈಗಲೇ ಪ್ಲೇಸ್ಟೋರ್ ಗೆ ಹೋಗಿ ಜಿಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಆಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ನೀವು ಕನ್ನಡದ ಮೂಲಕ ಈಸಿಯಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕು ಕಲಿಬಹುದು ಹಾಗೆ ಓದೋಕು ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. ಈಗಲೇ ಹೋಗಿ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Did you see? Similarly, if you want to learn English easily through Kannada, go to the Play Store right now and download the Zinglish app. In this, you can easily learn to speak English through Kannada as well as learn to read. Go and download it right now.]
